title: 2026 Grammy Predictions: Kendrick Lamar, Lady Gaga, Bad Bunny, and the List of Contenders
text: Total Music Awards provides comprehensive Grammy predictions across all major categories. For Album of the Year, given Bad Bunny's high-profile Super Bowl performance and the fact that all members of the Latin Grammy Academy can now vote for the traditional Grammy Awards, they predicted Debí Tirar Más Fotos would become the first Latin pop album to win Album of the Year. The analysis notes that Bad Bunny's album is both a love letter and a thesis, wherein he hones his craft with an album that carries emotional depth and unrelenting longevity. The prediction emphasizes that although his status as a Spanish-language artist may put him at a disadvantage in the context of past Grammy winners, his resounding success may push him toward making history at the Grammys. Other contenders analyzed include Lady Gaga's Mayhem for its return to dance-pop roots, Kendrick Lamar's GNX for capturing post-Drake momentum, and Tyler the Creator's Chromakopia for artistic growth. All eight nominees represent first-time contenders in the Album of the Year category.
